0.text: Secretions in the trachea and bronchi

1.text: Thickening of the bronchial wall in the lower lobes of both lungs, more prominent on the right

2.text: Peribronchial consolidation in the lower lobes of both lungs, more prominent on the right

3.text: Reticulonodular densities in the lower lobes of both lungs, more prominent on the right
